seoTitle: Tooloon vs Toongabbie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tooloon and Toongabbie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tooloon and Toongabbie.
heading: Tooloon vs Toongabbie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tooloon, New South Wales and Toongabbie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tooloon has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Toongabbie (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tooloon or Toongabbie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tooloon has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Toongabbie scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tooloon scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Toongabbie scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tooloon or Toongabbie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tooloon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
